name: Footprint
description: Footprint is an identity verification and onboarding platform offering KYC, KYB, document verification, selfie matching and a PCI-compliant vault for PII, built with clean APIs and SDKs for fintech and crypto teams.

seo.title: Footprint — KYC / KYB / AML API
